ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "crime_type" INTEGER /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number for the crime */,
  "reported_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime was reported */,
  "occurred_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the crime happened */,
  "disposition" INTEGER /* Current status of the case (e.g., closed, ongoing) */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary suspect (if any) */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary victim (if any) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary investigator */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who reported the crime */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "evidence_status" TEXT /* Status of evidence collection (e.g., Collected, Pending, Not Required) */,
  "case_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_disposition FOREIGN KEY ("disposition") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_crime_type FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type") REFERENCES crime_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_reporting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., Violent, Property, White-Collar) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address or general location description */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the crime occurred */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "disposition_name" TEXT /* Name of the case disposition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case disposition */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the case was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit or department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the officer (e.g., Active, On Leave, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_officer" (
  "crime_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-officer relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer handling the crime */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the officer was assigned to the case */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the case (e.g., Primary Investigator, Assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_officer_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_officer_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the victim */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement given by the victim regarding the crime */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the victim */,
  "relationship_to_suspect" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the suspect (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_victim" (
  "crime_victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-victim relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the victim was first contacted */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether follow-up is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victim_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victim_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Full name of the suspect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Physical description or other identifying information */,
  "arrest_status" TEXT /* Current arrest status of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the suspect */,
  "last_known_address" TEXT /* Last known address of the suspect */,
  "known_associates" TEXT /* Known associates of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_suspect" (
  "crime_suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime-suspect relationship */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the suspect was arrested */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who arrested the suspect */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Evidence collected against the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspect_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspect_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspect_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)
